memoryArtifacts.headline: Red Castle, Angus
memoryArtifacts.description:
In 1194, William conferred the castle, and land surrounding the village of Inverkeilor, 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) east of the castle, to Walter de Berkely, the Royal Chamberlain. On his death, his lands of Inverkeilor, with the castle, passed to Ingram de Balliol who had married the heiress of Walter. He rebuilt the castle and the property remained in that family for two generations. 
https://www.revolvy.com/topic/Red%20Castle,%20Angus&item_type=topic

zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronilla FitzPiers於1162年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Piers de Lutegareshale28歲，母親Maude Mandeville24歲。她和Eustace de Baliol至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1253年在英國達勒姆巴納德 卡素享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronilla FitzPiers于1162年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Piers de Lutegareshale28岁，母亲Maude Mandeville24岁。她和Eustace de Baliol至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1253年在英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronilla FitzPiers was born in 1162, in Essex, England, her father, Piers de Lutegareshale, was 28 and her mother, Maude Mandeville, was 24. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Eustace de Baliol. She died in 1253, in Barnard Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronilla FitzPiers est née en 1162, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Piers de Lutegareshale, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maude Mandeville, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Eustace de Baliol. Elle est décédée en 1253, à Barnard Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Petronilla FitzPiers 1162 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Piers de Lutegareshale 28 und ihre Mutter Maude Mandeville 24. Sie hatte mit Eustace de Baliol mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1253 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Barnard Castle, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla FitzPiers è nata il nel 1162 nel Essex, England, sua padre, Piers de Lutegareshale, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Maude Mandeville, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Eustace de Baliol. Morì nel 1253, nel Barnard Castle, Durham, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronilla FitzPiersが1162年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Piers de Lutegareshaleは28歳，母Maude Mandevilleは24歳であった。彼女はEustace de Baliolとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1253年にイギリスダルハムバーナルド カストルで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla FitzPiers(이)가 1162년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Piers de Lutegareshale(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude Mandeville(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Eustace de Baliol(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1253년 영국 뒤람 바른아르드 카스틀에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla FitzPiers nasceu em 1162, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Piers de Lutegareshale, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maude Mandeville, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Eustace de Baliol. Ela faleceu em 1253, em Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronilla FitzPiers родилась в 1162 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Piers de Lutegareshale было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Mandeville, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Eustace de Baliol. Она умерла в 1253 г. в местности барнард кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Petronilla FitzPiers nació en 1162, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Piers de Lutegareshale, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Maude Mandeville, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Eustace de Baliol. Murió en 1253, en Barnard Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
